name: Blaze Forex Mastery Blueprint
tagline: The exact system I use to trade forex profitably — no fluff, no fake screenshots.
description: A complete A-to-Z forex trading course built for Nigerians. Learn price action, risk management that protects your capital, and the psychology that separates funded traders from blown accounts. Includes real chart breakdowns and a plug-and-play trading plan.
whatsInside: My personal price-action strategy with entry/exit rules
Lifetime updates — every new edition free

testimonial.quote: I blew two accounts before this blueprint. Three months in, I passed my first $10k prop challenge. The risk management module alone is worth 10x the price.
testimonial.author: Tobi A.

name: Crypto Starter Pack for Nigerians
tagline: Buy, hold and trade crypto safely — built around the Nigerian reality (P2P, wallets, security).
description: Everything a Nigerian beginner needs to enter crypto without getting scammed. From setting up secure wallets and using P2P properly, to spotting real projects vs rug pulls, to a simple long-term accumulation strategy.
whatsInside: Top-10 red flags of scam projects

testimonial.quote: As a complete newbie I was scared of losing money to scams. This pack held my hand through everything. Now I stack sats every month with confidence.
testimonial.author: Chiamaka O.

name: JAMB 350+ Success Pack
tagline: The study system, past-question drills and exam hacks that push scores past 300.
description: A complete JAMB preparation system: a 12-week study timetable, solved past questions with explanations, subject-by-subject scoring strategies, and CBT exam-day tactics that stop careless mistakes from eating your score.
whatsInside: 5 years of solved past questions (all 4 subjects) with explanations
Subject scoring strategy guides (Eng, Maths, Physics, Chem, Bio, Govt...)

testimonial.quote: I scored 289 on my first attempt. Used this pack for my second sitting and hit 334. The timetable and solved questions changed everything for me.
testimonial.author: Ibrahim S.

name: Viral Ads Template Bundle
tagline: 150+ editable Canva templates that make your brand look like it has a design team.
description: Scroll-stopping ad creatives, WhatsApp status flyers, Instagram carousels and story templates — all editable in free Canva. Designed for Nigerian small businesses, vendors and personal brands that want to look premium without hiring a designer.
whatsInside: Hook & caption swipe file (50 proven hooks)
Video tutorial: customize everything in 10 minutes

testimonial.quote: My thrift page went from looking like every other vendor to looking like a real brand overnight. Sales DMs doubled in two weeks.
testimonial.author: Blessing E.

name: Campus Hustle Playbook
tagline: 17 legit side hustles you can run from your hostel with just a phone.
description: A practical playbook of income streams that actually work for Nigerian students — from freelancing and mini-importation to digital products and campus services. Each hustle comes with startup cost, realistic monthly income, and a step-by-step launch plan.
whatsInside: 17 hustle blueprints with startup costs & income ranges
Pricing & negotiation scripts for Nigerian clients

testimonial.quote: Started the freelancing blueprint in my second week. Made my first ₦45k within a month while still attending lectures. This book paid for itself 6 times over.
testimonial.author: Daniel K.

name: The Blaze Productivity Planner
tagline: A digital planner built for people juggling school, work and side hustles.
description: A beautifully designed digital planner (Notion + printable PDF) that keeps students and hustlers organized: goal setting, weekly sprints, money tracking, and a daily focus system that kills procrastination.
whatsInside: Notion template — duplicate in one click

testimonial.quote: I run two hustles alongside 400-level engineering. This planner is the only reason I'm not drowning. The weekly sprint system is genius.
testimonial.author: Fatima M.
